procedures.name: Chest X-Ray 2 Views (PA & Lateral)
procedures.description: Two-view chest radiograph including posteroanterior (PA) and lateral projections for comprehensive chest evaluation
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for screening for respiratory disorder NEC
procedures.prep_instructions: Remove all clothing and jewelry from waist up. Wear hospital gown.

procedures.name: Chest X-Ray 1 View (PA or AP)
procedures.description: Single-view chest radiograph, typically posteroanterior (PA) or anteroposterior (AP) projection
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for screening for respiratory disorder NEC
procedures.prep_instructions: Remove all clothing and jewelry from waist up. Wear hospital gown.

procedures.name: CT Head without Contrast
procedures.description: Non-contrast computed tomography of the head for evaluation of brain parenchyma, ventricles, and skull
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for other specified special examinations
procedures.prep_instructions: No special preparation required. Remove all metal objects from head and neck.

procedures.name: CT Head with Contrast
procedures.description: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography of the head for detailed evaluation of brain vasculature and lesions
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for other specified special examinations
procedures.prep_instructions: NPO 4 hours before exam. Check kidney function (creatinine). Remove all metal objects from head and neck.

procedures.name: CT Abdomen and Pelvis with Contrast
procedures.description: Contrast-enhanced CT of abdomen and pelvis for comprehensive evaluation of abdominal and pelvic organs
procedures.loinc_display: CT Abdomen and Pelvis W contrast IV
procedures.prep_instructions: NPO 4-6 hours before exam. Drink oral contrast 2 hours and 1 hour before exam. Check kidney function. Empty bladder before exam.

procedures.name: MRI Brain without Contrast
procedures.description: Non-contrast magnetic resonance imaging of the brain for detailed soft tissue evaluation
procedures.prep_instructions: No metal implants or devices contraindicated for MRI. Remove all metal objects. No special diet restrictions.

procedures.name: MRI Brain with Contrast
procedures.description: Contrast-enhanced MRI of the brain with gadolinium for enhanced lesion detection and characterization
procedures.prep_instructions: No metal implants or devices contraindicated for MRI. Remove all metal objects. Check kidney function (eGFR) for gadolinium contrast.

procedures.name: Ultrasound Abdomen Complete
procedures.description: Complete abdominal ultrasound including liver, gallbladder, pancreas, spleen, kidneys, and abdominal aorta
procedures.prep_instructions: Fasting 6-8 hours before exam. Drink 4-6 glasses of water 1 hour before exam and hold urine.

procedures.name: Ultrasound Obstetric First Trimester
procedures.description: First trimester obstetric ultrasound for pregnancy confirmation, dating, and early fetal assessment
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for supervision of normal first pregnancy, unspecified trimester
procedures.prep_instructions: Full bladder required for transabdominal approach. Drink 4-6 glasses of water 1 hour before exam.

procedures.name: X-Ray Lumbar Spine 2 Views (AP & Lateral)
procedures.description: Two-view lumbar spine radiograph for evaluation of vertebral alignment, disc spaces, and bony structures
procedures.prep_instructions: Wear comfortable clothing. Remove objects from pockets and waist area.

procedures.name: Mammography Bilateral Screening
procedures.description: Bilateral screening mammography for breast cancer detection with craniocaudal and mediolateral oblique views
procedures.icd10_display: Encounter for screening mammogram for malignant neoplasm of breast
procedures.prep_instructions: No deodorant, powder, or lotion on breast or underarm area. Best performed 1 week after menstruation.

procedures.name: CT Chest with Contrast
procedures.description: Contrast-enhanced CT of the chest for evaluation of lungs, mediastinum, and chest wall
procedures.icd10_display: Other nonspecific abnormal finding of lung field
procedures.prep_instructions: NPO 4 hours before exam. Check kidney function (creatinine). Remove all metal objects from chest area.

procedures.name: MRI Lumbar Spine with Contrast
procedures.description: MRI of lumbar spine for evaluation of disc herniation, spinal stenosis, and nerve root compression
procedures.loinc_display: MR Lumbar spine W contrast IV
procedures.icd10_display: Intervertebral disc disorders with radiculopathy, lumbar region
procedures.prep_instructions: No metal implants contraindicated for MRI. Remove all metal objects. Check kidney function if contrast required.

procedures.name: Ultrasound Thyroid
procedures.description: Ultrasound examination of thyroid gland for nodule detection and characterization

procedures.name: X-Ray Skull 2 Views (AP & Lateral)
procedures.description: Two-view skull radiograph for evaluation of cranial bones and skull fractures
procedures.icd10_display: Unspecified injury of head, initial encounter
procedures.prep_instructions: Remove all metal objects, jewelry, and hairpins from head and neck area.
